pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + Brotli — 1.1125 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels, widens MLP to 3.5× hidden dim, and pairs Hessian-mixed int5/int6 quantization with Brotli compression.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA + CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels with pre-computed activation gradient
3.5× MLP width driven by SVD-based capacity analysis
Hessian-trace mixed int5/int6 quantization alongside Brotli-11 compression
